name: Burger Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground beef, cracker crumbs, onion, celery, egg, Worcestershire sauce, oregano, and salt in a large bowl. Mix well.
2. Shape the mixture into an 8-inch (20 cm) tinfoil pieplate or similar small pan. If using regular ground beef, it may need to be drained first.
3. Pat the beef mixture into an even patty on the bottom of the pan.
4. Scatter the mushrooms, pepperoni slices, tomato, and green pepper over the meat.
5. Sprinkle with additional pepper and top with shredded mozzarella cheese and grated Parmesan cheese.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20-25 minutes, or until the meat is no longer pink.
7. Serve immediately.
4 servings: 2 protein, 1/2 fat & oils, 3 g carbohydrate; 16 g protein; 9 g fat (157 calories). Source: Choice Cooking, Canadian Diabetes Association (1/2 original recipe). Posted by Elizabeth Rodier, 4/93. Extra can be frozen in portions and reheated in the microwave or oven.
